title: Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Jerome Powell's final rate decision kept the benchmark lending rate at 3.5-3.75%. Powell's term as Fed chair ended with this decision. The Fed signaled no furth
excerpt: Jerome Powell's final rate decision kept the benchmark lending rate at 3.5-3.75%. Powell's term as Fed chair ended with this decision. The Fed signaled no further rate hikes. Powell's tenure concluded with this meeting.

content.introduction: Jerome Powell's final rate decision kept the benchmark lending rate at 3.5-3.75%. Powell's term as Fed chair ended with this decision. The Fed signaled no further rate hikes. Powell's tenure concluded with this meeting.
body: Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's last rate decision as Fed chair. Powell's news conference after holding rates covere.
Fed officials kept the benchmark lending rate in a range of 3.5-3.75%, in what was Jerome Powell's final meeting as chair before his term ends
